name: Suspicious FTP Transfer
description: A large FTP transfer was detected, which could indicate data exfiltration. This warrants immediate investigation to determine legitimacy and potential compromise.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the FTP transfer event.

parameters.name: source_ip
parameters.description: The source IP address from which the FTP transfer originated.

parameters.name: destination_ip
parameters.description: The destination IP address to which the FTP transfer was made.

parameters.name: source_port
parameters.description: The source port used for the FTP transfer.

parameters.name: destination_port
parameters.description: The destination port used for the FTP transfer (typically 20 or 21).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The FTP user account involved in the transfer.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: The name of the file transferred via FTP.

parameters.name: bytes_transferred
parameters.description: The size of the transferred file in bytes.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the transfer was initiated (if available from logs).
